/home/scratch.huanhuanc_gpu/spmd/kokkos/bin/nvcc_wrapper -maxrregcount=64 -DKOKKOS_DEPENDENCE -arch=sm_90 CMakeFiles/hydro_swe_swap.dir/hydro_swe_swap.cpp.o -o hydro_swe_swap  kokkos/containers/src/libkokkoscontainers.a kokkos/algorithms/src/libkokkosalgorithms.a kokkos/simd/src/libkokkossimd.a kokkos/core/src/libkokkoscore.a /home/scratch.huanhuanc_gpu/spmd/cuda-toolkit/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/stubs/libcuda.so /home/scratch.huanhuanc_gpu/spmd/cuda-toolkit/targets/x86_64-linux/lib/libcudart.so /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so -ldl
